name: Meta-Stamp Pockets
description: The first commercial implementation of HTTP 402 Payment Required for creator content monetization. AI agents pay $0.0025 per content pull from paywalled creator libraries. Patent-pending micropayment infrastructure that automatically compensates creators.

tools.name: pull_content
tools.description: Pull licensed creator content from a Pocket. Returns title, transcript, metadata. Costs $0.0025 per pull credited to creator.

tools.name: search_pockets
tools.description: Search available creator content libraries by keyword.

tools.name: list_pockets
tools.description: List all available Pockets in the system.
